title: $η$-Ricci Solitons on Kenmotsu 3-Manifolds
summary: In the present paper we study $η$-Ricci solitons on Kenmotsu 3-manifolds. Moreover, we consider $η$-Ricci solitons on Kenmotsu 3-manifolds with Codazzi type of Ricci tensor and cyclic parallel Ricci tensor. Beside these, we study $φ$-Ricci symmetric $η$-Ricci soliton on Kenmotsu 3-manifolds. Also Kenmotsu 3-manifolds satisfying the curvature condition $R.R=Q(S,R)$ is considered. Finally, an example is constructed to prove the existence of a proper $η$-Ricci soliton on a Kenmotsu 3-manifold.
publication_venue: Analele Universitatii de Vest, Timisoara, LVI (2018), 51-63
